creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
Good, but a more complete patch for version 0.1.2.14
of security/tor-devel, which has just been declared to
be the latest stable version by the upstream
maintainer, is already in hand.

See ports/112493 followup:

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112493
